# Levora Academy

Levora Academy is a premium education institute in India providing expert coaching for JEE, NEET, and Classes 6-12. 
We offer specialized study materials, highly experienced faculty, and a 99% success rate in board exams.

## Services & Courses
- JEE Coaching
- NEET Preparation
- Class 6-12 Tuitions
- Coding Classes
- Spoken English

## Contact & Admissions
Admissions are currently open for the 2025-26 batch.
Website: https://levoraacademy.vercel.app

## About Us
Our vision is shaping bright futures through premium education, batch empowering learning, and comprehensive study materials.
